author: Professor Johnson
text: How are everyone finding the difficulty level of this course?

author: Alice
text: The material is challenging but manageable.

author: Bob
text: I find the assignments too demanding for the time we have.

author: Carol
text: I actually think it's too easy. We need more rigor.

author: Dan
text: Maybe we could have different difficulty tracks?

author: Eve
text: That's a good idea. Optional advanced topics would help.

author: Frank
text: What about providing more resources for struggling students?

author: Grace
text: Office hours have been really helpful for me.

author: Henry
text: Can we have more office hours? Current times don't work for me.
